title: Deepslate to Cobbled deepslate
description: Simple pack that adds a recipe to the stonecutter, crafting table and crafter.
body:
> ### ⚠️ Notice
> **As of version 26.x this feature is implemented in vanilla minecraft!** 
> This datapack is no longer required or maintained for newer versions.

# Silktouch crew assemble!
This datapack adds deepslate to the Stonecutter, Crafting Table and Crafter to create cobbled deepslate.

![Stonecutter recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4507e4d203432031bfac3ff2af9189664ce71b72.png)

![Crafting Table/Crafter recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c0f41e1b18ec4b0f56edeadab6c3a1ffd518c6.png)

This is a simple datapack which has no additional config. It adds something the game should already have.
